title: How SentinelOne’s AI EDR Autonomously Discovered and Stopped Anthropic’s Claude

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - How SentinelOne’s AI EDR Autonomously Discovered and Stopped
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/03
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*litellm.proxy*'
            - '*models.litellm.cloud*'
            - '*sysmon.service*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
